name: mega-ts
description: Greenfield TypeScript stack selection and idiomatic TypeScript patterns.

interface.shortDescription: Opinionated TypeScript stack and design guidance.
interface.longDescription: Skills for choosing a greenfield TypeScript stack (pnpm, strict tsconfig, vitest, Hono, zod) and applying idiomatic TypeScript patterns around types, error handling, promise/async correctness, and testing.
defaultPrompt: Use mega-ts to scaffold this service.
Use mega-ts to review this TypeScript design.
